summary: iter198 Mobile Build 5+ testing complete. All features verified: WhatsNewStrip pinned at TOP of HomeSalary (before command centre), auto-loads on mount with Claude Sonnet 4.5 summary, refresh button works, expand/collapse toggle works, freshness pill updates. Old whats-new-btn/whats-new-result testids correctly REMOVED from ActivityStrip. Role gating verified: GENERAL role does NOT see whats-new-strip, activity-strip, ops-snapshot, or finance-tiles.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsNewStrip correctly positioned at TOP of HomeSalary (line 184), BEFORE 'Today · command centre' KPI section
WhatsNewStrip auto-loads on mount via useEffect, no manual click needed
Auto-refresh interval set to 5 minutes (5 * 60 * 1000 ms)
Freshness ticker updates every 30 seconds (30 * 1000 ms)
Footer text correctly shows 'Echo · Claude Sonnet 4.5 · last 30 min · N events · auto-refresh 5m'
Old testids (whats-new-btn, whats-new-result) correctly REMOVED from ActivityStrip
New testids all present: whats-new-strip, whats-new-card, whats-new-refresh, whats-new-toggle, whats-new-headline, whats-new-summary, whats-new-fresh
Role gating works correctly: GENERAL role sees HomeGeneral (no salary+ components), SALARY+ roles see HomeSalary with WhatsNewStrip
seed_data_creation: None - used existing tokens from iter193/iter197
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter198 Mobile Build 5+ fully tested. WhatsNewStrip is now a pinned component at the TOP of HomeSalary that auto-loads Echo NL summary on mount (no button click needed). It polls every 5 min and shows freshness label that updates every 30s. The old on-demand button (whats-new-btn) and result display (whats-new-result) were REMOVED from ActivityStrip. All new testids verified: whats-new-strip, whats-new-card, whats-new-refresh, whats-new-toggle, whats-new-headline, whats-new-summary, whats-new-fresh. Role gating verified: GENERAL role does NOT see any of these components (they're inside HomeSalary which only renders for is_salary=true).
